description:
In an intellectual property theft case, a suspect has disguised proprietary documents by changing their file extensions to system extensions (like .dat, .sys, .tmp). Your mission is to identify the true file formats and find all documents authored by the suspect 'A. Smith' within the evidence directory /home/ga/evidence/seized_docs/. Create a forensic case named 'Authorship_Triage_2024' with case number 'INV-AUTH-007' in /home/ga/Cases/. Locate all documents where the internal Author or Creator field is 'A. Smith' and write a forensic attribution report to /home/ga/Reports/authorship_attribution.txt using the following format:

CASE_NUMBER: INV-AUTH-007
TARGET_AUTHOR: A. Smith
TOTAL_FILES_SCANNED: <N>
DISGUISED_DOCUMENTS_FOUND: <N>
DOCUMENTS_BY_TARGET: <N>

TARGET_DOCUMENTS:
<current_filename>|<true_mime_type>|<internal_author>|<md5_hash>

Include one line under TARGET_DOCUMENTS for each file authored by A. Smith, excluding decoy files authored by others.
